title: Section — Scope Register
description: The master scope of work, normalized into CSI-coded line items. This is the spine of the whole record: takeoff quantities, estimate/SOV lines, trades, and sub bids all map back to a scope_item_id here. Inclusions, exclusions, alternates, and allowances are captured as written so downstream leveling/compliance tools have a single basis to compare against. Scope is organized, not judged — completeness/compliance reasoning is the RFP-analysis and bid-leveling skills' job.

basis.description: What the scope was derived from (e.g. 'RFP Section 01 11 00 Summary of Work + drawing index').

items.description: One row per scope item — the master line-item basis for all comparison.

scope_item_id.description: Stable id, e.g. 'SC-0260-01'. Referenced by takeoff, estimate, trades, sub bids.

category.description: How the scope item is treated commercially.

responsible_party.description: Who carries it: 'this_contractor', 'owner', 'by_others', or a named trade.

uom.description: Unit the scope is measured/paid in (for unit-price scope).

exclusions.description: Project-level exclusions / clarifications stated in the documents, verbatim. Flagged because a blank reads as 'free' to a leveling tool.
